query:
SELECT b.id, b.userId, b.poolId, b.gameId, b.predictedScoreA, b.predictedScoreB, 
  b.pointsEarned, b.resultType, b.createdAt, b.updatedAt,
  u.name as user_name,
  g.scoreA as real_A, g.scoreB as real_B, g.status as game_status,
  g.matchDate, p.name as pool_name
FROM bets b
JOIN users u ON u.id = b.userId
JOIN games g ON g.id = b.gameId
JOIN pools p ON p.id = b.poolId
WHERE b.id = 1;
